title: lithocarpus sabulicola
intro: Lithocarpus sabulicola, also known as the Coastal Live Oak or Sabulicola Lithocarpus, is a plant species in the beech family Fagaceae. It is native to the coastal regions of California and Mexico in the Americas, where it grows as a small tree or shrub. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus sabulicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, and it has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide several health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
